execReport:
Overall Status — The portfolio remains healthy with 22 active initiatives and 28 of 68 completed (41%). With 0 items Pending FH and 11 Pending AEGON, the critical path is currently on AEGON's side. The main concern is 7 overdue milestones requiring immediate attention to avoid further slippage.
This Week's Progress —

Closed initiative #16 (Lateralidades nas Exclusões) — moved to Done
Closed initiative #57 (Medical Network Search) — confirmed as service not required
Initiative #1 (Aumento de Capital & Alteração de Coberturas – PRO RATA) advanced from Pending FH to Business Requirements, unblocking design work
Active pipeline holds steady: 4 in QA Testing, 3 in Business Requirements, 2 In Progress, 1 QA Approved, 1 in Dev Testing

Key Actions Required —

Unblock the 11 initiatives currently Pending ASP — these represent the largest queue and are gating downstream delivery
Realign training and production dates for the 7 overdue milestones (#15, #17, #18, #23, #26, #55, #56), with priority on the four with Train dates of 04/05/2026
Confirm new target date for initiative #15 (Alinhamento dos Ambientes de Teste), overdue since 30/06/2025 and a prerequisite for several QA-stage items
